name: Chinese Chicken Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Crunch up unopened Top Ramen with a meat tenderizer mallet.
2. Carefully open the package and remove the seasoning packet.
3. Place the ramen noodles in a microwave-safe dish along with sesame seeds and almonds.
4. Microwave on high for one minute, stir thoroughly, then microwave for another minute and allow to cool.
5. Chop cabbage.
6. Mix dressing ingredients together in a hand-blender.
7. To serve, toss all ingredients together.
